entities.name: NITRIC OXIDE
entities.description: A key signaling molecule involved in mediating plant responses to heat stress and enhancing tolerance.

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: High temperature abiotic stress that challenges agricultural productivity.

entities.name: HEAT STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of plants to maintain function and survive under high temperature conditions.

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: A biological process in plants mediated by Nitric Oxide under heat stress.

entities.name: OXIDATIVE DEFENSE
entities.description: A plant response mechanism mediated by Nitric Oxide to combat oxidative stress during heat stress.

entities.name: OSMOLYTE ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The process of accumulating osmolytes to maintain cellular turgor, mediated by Nitric Oxide under heat stress.

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION
entities.description: The process by which information from a gene is used in the synthesis of a functional gene product, mediated by Nitric Oxide under heat stress.

entities.name: PROTEIN MODIFICATIONS
entities.description: Changes to protein structures mediated by Nitric Oxide in response to heat stress.

entities.name: SIGNALING MOLECULES
entities.description: Molecules that interact with Nitric Oxide to help the plant attain heat tolerance.

entities.name: PHYTOHORMONES
entities.description: Plant hormones that interact with Nitric Oxide to regulate heat stress tolerance.

entities.name: SIGNAL TRANSDUCTION COMPONENTS
entities.description: Functional intermediaries associated with Nitric Oxide-mediated heat stress signaling.

entities.name: FEED-BACK REGULATIONS
entities.description: Plant hormone induced regulations involving Nitric Oxide signaling.

entities.name: ROS/NO BALANCE
entities.description: The equilibrium between Reactive Oxygen Species and Nitric Oxide in plant cells.

entities.name: GENE TRANSCRIPTION
entities.description: The process of copying a segment of DNA into RNA, induced by stress and involving Nitric Oxide.

entities.name: PLANT
entities.description: The biological organism subject to heat stress and utilizing Nitric Oxide for tolerance.

relationships.description: interacts with to attain heat tolerance
interacts with to attain heat tolerance
is involved in hormone induced regulations
is a component of the balance
is involved in stress induced transcription
is the condition that the trait provides tolerance against
